target: 13. I'm Sorry
Aaaaaaaah!!!
Stop it!!!!
—Mio!?
Mio-chan jumped in between Tokiko and Shinpei!
Move, get out of the way, Mio!
M-Mio...!
I won't move! I absolutely won't move!
Please, Mio...! I don't want to... kill you too...!
If that happens, then that's that.
Mio, you can't... If you get any closer...!
I'm the one who had to accept it.
I didn't know anything until now... And I ended up making you suffer, Tokiko.
Even though you've been protecting me this whole time, Tokiko.
Cooperating with the Shadows... You were agonizing over it all alone, weren't you.
You couldn't tell anyone, could you?
Y... yeah...
Tokiko… I'm sorry.
I should have been the first to notice.
Even though we're best friends... Even though it's you, Tokiko, who's so important to me...
U-Uuuu...
I-I'm the one... who should be sorry! I... Ushio-san...
I did something... that can't be undone...!
U-Uuu... Miooo...!!
I hate this...! Why... why did I...!
Uwaaaaaan!!
I'm sorry!! *Sniff*, I'm so sorry...!!
I want to go back to normal!
Like before... I want to be with everyone, with Mio!
Yeah... that's right.
Ue, uuu...! Uwaaaaaaaah!! Aaaaaaah...!
Thank goodness... You understood...
My, what a display of youth.
You showed me something good. I was quite moved!
You guys…
Oops, excuse me. Did I interrupt you?
Personally, I'd like to keep watching, but it seems Haine feels differently.
A farce like that is just a waste of time to watch.
Hey, what about everyone... What did you do to the teachers!?
Ah, I took care of them all without exception.
Are you serious...!
Even though you had no chance of winning, you were so persistent, weren't you? That was the real waste of time.
There wasn't even a moving scene, so you should have just come here from the start.
Now, now, don't get so worked up. You'll be catching up to them soon enough.
Shut uuuup!!!
Stop.
My body... won't move...!?
Your role is finished. Just be quiet.
This is... my body! It's my body, and yet...!
Move! Moveeee!!!
Kuu... uuu!!
Don't glare at me with such a scary face. You're on our side, right?
Think about it carefully. There's no way you could ever be allies with Shinpei-kun and the others.
You killed Mio-chan's older sister, Ushio-chan. Don't you think it's a bit shameless?
I thought you were a smart girl. But it seems you've broken.
That's right. I'll mess with your head later.
N-No... I don't want that...!
You bastard!!
Oh my, you're energetic. Do you still want to fight?
My nail gun disappeared! I'm borrowing Mio-chan's!
Take this!!!
This is...
A flamethrower!! Burn to ashes, all of you!
Don't worry, Tokiko! You're going to be our ally!
So don't take what that guy says seriously!
Older brother...
Such beautiful sibling love. Yes, it's not bad, but...
It's a bit too suffocating. Please disappear.
Guaaaaaa!!!
Older brother!!
Sou-kun!!
Damn it!! How dare you do that to Sou!!
Even if you attack out of anger, you won't get good results, you know?
It's no use! My attacks aren't working at all!
If you want to take down your opponent for sure, calmness is key after all. Just like this, see—
Gubo...
Shin-chan!?
Like this, you see?
Shin-chan!? Wake up, Shin-chan!!
Shin-chaaaan!!!
(Not yet... I haven't given up yet.)
(What can I do right now? Bird's-eye view... take a bird's-eye view.)
Hehe, it's useless to think. There's nothing left for you to do.
Now then, it's almost time for the finale. Please enjoy it to the fullest, Shinpei-kun.
(It's no good... I can't... move anymore.)
Sou-kun... and even Shin-chan...
Aa, aaaa...!
Tokiko-chan! Well, thanks for your hard work.
Thanks to you, it looks like everything will be wrapped up nicely.
(I can't... loop anymore.)
(Mio... Toki-chan... If only the two of you at least—)
Good for you, Tokiko-chan. Now you can be with your beloved Mio-chan forever, right?
Th-That's...
Tokiko, are you really okay with letting these guys say whatever they want!?
It's to avenge everyone! Let's take these guys down together!
Hahaha, you're energetic. I thought your spirit would have been broken long ago.
Hey, haven't you forgotten about me!? I can't move though!
Ah, come to think of it, that's right. There was a Mio-chan over there too.
But... what do you think? We don't need two Mio-chans, right?
You're going to erase one of us, is that what you're saying?
You're very perceptive. That is exactly what it means.
Please! Mio... please don't kill Mio!!
Now then... which one should we choose?
C-Come at me!! I won't go down without a fight!!
Come on, say something!!
Shut up for a bit. You've been noisy for a while now.
—Eh?
What's with you all of a sudden? I thought I was being left in charge of everything.
You're just teasing them and not doing anything, so I got tired of waiting.
Oh my, excuse me.
Well, I was hungry too, you know.
(Don't tell me... even Mio...!)
(My consciousness... is fading...)
Ugh... ku, uaaaaaah!!
(Toki-chan's... crying voice...)
(In the end, I... couldn't save...)
(...anyone...)
